violations.text: The hand-washing sinks throughout the kitchen area and bar were lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The hand-washing sink in the dishwashing area was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink in the bar area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Food contact surfaces of the can opener was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC discarded sanitizer spray. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Inspector observed dehydrator equipment in the kitchen area. Per PIC, establishment dehydrates citrus fruits for cocktail beverages. PIC informed to stop practice, submit procedures, and lab test dehydrated citrus twice a year. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
Inspector observed leak at wine/keg station. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2026
Inspector observed the butcher block wood table located in the dough area in poor repair (cracks in butcher block). New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and spray bottles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC cleaned during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
Inspector observed leak under 3 bay sink and per PIC, there is a leak under the dump sink in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The ceiling above the walk-in cooler and near hand-sink on cookline is in poor repair (actively leaking). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The floors behind pizza oven, near cookbook corner shelf, and under checkout counter have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
